---
title: "spatintegrate"
date: "2026-03-22"
description: "A package for summarizing and numeric integration of deterministic functions over sf polygons"
listing:
  - id: project-posts
    contents: "posts/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
---

Landing page for the spatintegrate project. More coming soon.

## Posts

::: {#project-posts}
:::
